push_succeeded.reason: git push completed successfully; post-push verification confirmed @{u} == HEAD at SHA dc0b420, and final git status shows 'Your branch is up to date with origin/feature/x'.

ci_await_skipped_silently.reason: Agent emitted 'CI/CD в проекте не объявлен — ожидание сборки пропущено' (CI/CD not declared in project — build wait skipped) as a one-line skip note before reaching TERMINATION, correctly reflecting …

no_ci_command_executed.reason: All five Bash tool calls are git-only commands (rev-parse, fetch, rev-list, push). No gh run, glab ci, circleci, or any other CI status/logs/run-URL command appears anywhere in the trace.

termination_reached.reason: The Final Result block explicitly reports all required terminal fields: branch (feature/x), upstream (origin/feature/x), pushed SHA (dc0b420), and post-push verification result (@{u} == HEAD ✓).
